case_title: MARK POE et al VS. ROYAL CLEANING COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,075.00 FILED BY POE, MARK NOEL, KAIVALYA AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL CLEANING COMPANY LIMA, CALEBE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
COURT'S MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT ROYAL CLEANING COMPANY RETURNED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDAN T EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT DID NOT SUBMIT DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE TO THE COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-27-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-20-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$240.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF POE, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL CLEANING COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$AMOUNT NOT STATED) SERVED AUG-10-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL CLEANING COMPANY
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF TO AMEND/CHANGE DEFENDANT'S LAST NAME. FILED BY PLAINTIFF POE, MARK NOEL, KAIVALYA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT STATED) SERVED AUG-10-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIMA, CALEBE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ROYAL CLEANING COMPANY LIMA, CALEBE
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS AND LETTER OF THE DEFENDANT FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT ROYAL CLEANING COMPANY LIMA, CALEBE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,075.00 FILED BY POE, MARK NOEL, KAIVALYA AS TO DEFENDANT ROYAL CLEANING COMPANY LIMA, CALEBE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF POE, MARK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-12-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
COURT'S MAIL SENT TO DEFENDANT CALEBE LIMA RETURNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POE, MARK NOEL, KAIVALYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROYAL CLEANING COMPANY LIMA, CALEBE $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
